title: BatchDeletePartitionRequest
description: BatchDeletePartitionRequest schema from Amazon Glue API

allOf.description: The ID of the Data Catalog where the partition to be deleted resides. If none is provided, the Amazon Web Services account ID is used by default.
The name of the catalog database in which the table in question resides.
The name of the table that contains the partitions to be deleted.
A list of PartitionInput structures that define the partitions to be deleted.
